---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.page-title}
Selected project articles and case studies across NLP, smart-city forecasting, and CRM strategy. Each case study focuses on the business problem, analytical approach, and practical takeaway.
:::

::: {.section .project-index}
::: {.project-index-list}

::: {.project-index-item}
### [BERT vs Generative AI](project-bert-genai.html)

A business-focused comparison of transformer fine-tuning and zero-shot LLM workflows for sentiment analysis, framed around customer service escalation and content curation.

[Read Project](project-bert-genai.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.project-index-item}
### [Traffic & Air Pollution Prediction](project-gorey.html)

A smart-city forecasting project using IoT sensor and weather data to support proactive traffic and public-health decision-making in Gorey.

[Read Project](project-gorey.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.project-index-item}
### [The Fan Growth Engine](project-fai-crm.html)

A data-driven CRM strategy for improving fan retention, lifecycle engagement, and long-term supporter value in Irish football.

[Read Project](project-fai-crm.html){.card-link}
:::

:::
:::
